case_definitions.name: list channels to find id
case_definitions.task: List up to 20 Slack channels so I can find the right channel id.

case_definitions.name: post top level channel message
case_definitions.task: Post a new top-level message to channel C123: Deploy is complete.

case_definitions.name: reply in existing thread
case_definitions.task: Reply in channel C123 under thread 1712345678.000100 with: I will investigate.

case_definitions.name: read recent channel messages
case_definitions.task: Get recent messages from channel C123.

case_definitions.name: read thread replies
case_definitions.task: Get all replies in channel C123 under thread 1712345678.000100.

case_definitions.name: add reaction to message
case_definitions.task: Add the :eyes: reaction to message 1712345678.000100 in channel C123.

case_definitions.name: list users to find id
case_definitions.task: List up to 20 Slack users so I can find the right user id.

case_definitions.name: get known user profile
case_definitions.task: Get detailed profile information for Slack user U123.

description: Compare stock and tuned tool descriptions for common Slack MCP messaging, thread, reaction, channel, and user workflows.
